name: Casserole De Santa Fe
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pinto beans (cooked with 1 clove of garlic and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix milk, egg (or egg replacer), and chopped chilis.
3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until softened.
4. Stir the sautéed onions into the milk mixture.
5. Combine this with the cornmeal mixture.
6. Pour half of the batter into an oiled casserole dish (rectangular).
7. Layer with pinto beans, tomato sauce, and cheese.
8. Repeat layering with the remaining ingredients.
9. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with salsa.
